title: Micro2021 - Artifact - Principal Kernel Analysis Github Repo
author: Cesar Avalos
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Script cloning the github repo that hosts the PKA artifact. In it we find Dockerfile.gpu which will generate and setup the environment to run Accel-Sim and perform PKA on a diverse set of benchmarks.
steps_raw: Script cloning the github repo that hosts the PKA artifact. In it we find Dockerfile.gpu which will generate and setup the environment to run Accel-Sim and perform PKA on a diverse set of benchmarks.
